item.title: Publications
item.author: arun.chavan@yale.edu (Arun Chavan)
item.description: Google Scholar | ResearchGate | ORCiD Evolution of embryo implantation was enabled by the origin of decidual cells in eutherian mammals. Chavan AR, Griffith OW, Stadtmauer D, Maziarz JD, Pavlicev M, Fishman R, Koren L, Romero R, Wagner GP (2018) BioRxiv 429571 | pdf The mammalian decidual cell evolved from a cellular stress response.
